title: Flodesk vs Sendinblue (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Flodesk vs Sendinblue: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between Flodesk and Sendinblue comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Flodesk is built for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Sendinblue targets transactional email and SMS campaigns. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on transactional email and SMS campaigns

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Flodesk wins for visual brands, photographers, and designers, while Sendinblue is stronger for transactional email and SMS campaigns. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Flodesk or Sendinblue?
faq.a: Sendinblue starts at a lower price point ($25/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Sendinblue to Flodesk?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Sendinblue to Flodesk is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
